feature: Workplan Live Execution Overlay in hex plan list
description: hex plan list overlays live execution state from SpacetimeDB so completed/running counts are always accurate, not stale JSON file counts.

phases.name: Nexus lookup route
phases.description: Add a nexus endpoint to look up the latest execution for a given workplan filename

tasks.name: Add GET /api/workplan/by-path route
tasks.description: Add route handler in hex-nexus/src/routes/orchestration.rs: GET /api/workplan/by-path?path=<filename>. Query hexflo_memory_search('workplan:') via state port, deserialize each ExecutionState, filter by workplan_path ending with the given filename, sort by updated_at descending, return the most recent match. Return 404 if none found. Register route in hex-nexus/src/routes/mod.rs.

phases.name: CLI overlay
phases.description: Wire live execution counts into hex plan list output

tasks.name: Fetch live execution per workplan in plan list
tasks.description: In hex-cli/src/commands/plan.rs, the plan list command iterates workplan files. For each file, make a GET /api/workplan/by-path?path=<filename> call. If it returns an execution, replace the completed count with execution.completed_tasks and append the execution status as a suffix badge (e.g. '[running 3/28]', '[completed 28/28]', '[failed 5/28]'). If the nexus call fails or returns 404, fall back to the JSON-derived count silently.

tasks.name: Smoke test plan list with active execution
tasks.description: Manually verify: start hex_plan_execute on a workplan, immediately run hex plan list, confirm the active workplan shows live progress counts rather than 0. Document result in ADR-2603312300 as 'Accepted'.
